content.text:
Both files have been created successfully. Here's a summary:

**Created files:**

1. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\pdf\PdfDownloadManager.kt` (2583 bytes)
   - `PdfDownloadManager` class - handles PDF downloads via OkHttp with cookie support, Content-Disposition filename parsing, and safe file naming
   - `DownloadResult` sealed class - `Success` (filePath, fileName, fileSize) and `Error` (message)

2. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\pdf\PdfParser.kt` (4398 bytes)
   - `PdfParser` class - extracts text from PDFs using iText first, falling back to ML Kit OCR with Chinese text recognition
   - `SubpoenaInfo` data class - holds parsed fields: caseNumber, courtName, hearingTime, partyNames, location
   - Regex-based parsing for court subpoena documents (case numbers, hearing times, party names, locations)

Both files are ready for integration into the CourtAssistant Android project.
